title: Extracting Phone Numbers from Text Data
scenario: A company has a large text dataset containing customer information, including phone numbers. The goal is to extract the phone numbers from the text data and present them in a formatted CSV file, specifically excluding phone numbers that are not in a valid format
constraints: Must use a regular expression to match phone numbers
Must exclude phone numbers that are not in a valid format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the regular expression used to match phone numbers is valid
Check if the extracted phone numbers are accurate and match the expected results
Check if the extracted phone numbers are presented in the correct format
